name: feature.insights-suite.nodes
description: Insights & Drafting Agent Suite node pack (ADR 0078) — pure compute building blocks the suite's meta-workflows use. variance-compute (Actual-vs-Plan for store sales/margin/labor/shrink, flags off-plan metrics) and talent-score (9-box performance×potential readiness). No host surface, no external egress — deterministic math, replay-safe.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Variance: Actual vs Plan
nodes.description: Computes Actual-vs-Plan deltas + percentages for a business unit's sales/margin/labor/shrink and flags metrics beyond a threshold. Pure compute.

nodes.label: Talent: 9-box readiness
nodes.description: Maps a person's performance (1-3) × potential (1-3) to a 9-box cell + a readiness category. Pure compute.
